sections.label: Verse 1
lines: In gam a ding nang bang na geel, mawhna kol sung;
Gal in don vaw mulkim huai lua, luankhi tawh,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hong itlua veng aw, Ih zogam mialpi sung zong,
Banghang tuciang Zeisu meel a leeng lo;
Kua muang na hiamigam a ding Zeisu in,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hong mial semsem ding lh Zogam maw u leh nau;
Dipkuat huai lua tulai lh nuntakna thu,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Nang le kei ih mawhpuak hi na thei nai maw?
Gupna khuavak nibang taang hen Zogam ah,
